title: How to use when an email is received ad it as an update automation?

posts.author: HenryNorris (Henry Norris)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’m struggling to get the automation for “When an email from (email column) is received add it as an update” to fire.

Has anyone be able to get it to work?

In an ideal world I want someone to be able to send in an update to their task by email if they don’t have an account and would normally be a viewer who can’t add updates.
